summary.concern: Stephanie and Marc Felton — 36 overdue + 1 active-blocked tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 168 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 90 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 33 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 2 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 43 days past due with 36 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **26 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $19,895 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 14 days past due with 30 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **81 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 11 days past due with 28 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **39 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $18,424 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 31 days past due with 14 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **20 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $18,450 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** The oldest overdue task is 12 days past due with 12 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **9 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 15 days past due with 10 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **22 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $20,083 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 14 days past due with 9 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **33 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $22,960 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

306 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **274 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 27 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$72,741 in payments going out this week** across 48 tasks — make sure funds are available. $89,409 expected in from 9 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) and Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco has 16 overdue across 2 projects with 0 tasks active.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 12 overdue (oldest: 12d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **9 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 14 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 9 overdue (oldest: 14d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **33 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 43 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 4. Keep the momentum going.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 36 overdue (oldest: 43d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **26 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 30 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 28 overdue (oldest: 11d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **39 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 40 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 4 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 12. Keep the momentum going.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 30 overdue (oldest: 14d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **81 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 81 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Ginger Brown:** 14 overdue (oldest: 31d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **20 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 25 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 10 overdue (oldest: 15d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **22 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 28 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
